opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest feels incredibly tight and I keep blacking out when I stand, but I cannot stop working or they'll realize I don't belong here.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The chest tightness and the near-fainting when I stand up got much worse tonight after days of not stopping, and I'm scared but I still have to finish my work.

symptom_narrative.onset: building over the last 3 days of constant work, much worse tonight
symptom_narrative.character: a tight, pressured feeling in the chest, with my heart pounding and racing, and feeling like I'll black out whenever I stand up
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've felt — I'm shaking and can barely stay upright
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: middle of the chest, plus dizziness in my head when I stand
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse on standing and after pushing through more work
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting still helps the dizziness a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up, and every time I make myself keep working
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: pounding heart, dizziness, trembling, complete exhaustion, haven't slept
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing this bad before, but I've been running on empty and anxious about work for a long time
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't safely stand up or look after myself right now, but I feel I can't stop working

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: energy drinks (using them to stay awake and keep working)

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: barely eating or drinking water, living on caffeine for 3 days
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: high-pressure corporate job; feels she doesn't belong and fears colleagues will realise she isn't good enough; puts her successes down to being a 'diversity hire'; won't ask for help in case it exposes her; has worked continuously for about 3 days preparing for a routine presentation

objective_data_offered.value: looks pale and is visibly trembling, with dark circles under the eyes
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance only, over video — not a clinical examination

objective_data_offered.value: speech is fast and pressured; keeps glancing at and reaching for a work laptop during the call
about five empty energy-drink cans and stacks of work papers spread across the table
says her heart is 'pounding and racing' and she feels like she'll black out each time she stands
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective; no home device reading available
